ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laptops" (
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laptop model */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* UUID for each laptop */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the laptop */,
  "processor" INTEGER /* Processor type (e.g., Intel Core i5) */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Memory capacity (e.g., 8GB) */,
  "hard_drive" INTEGER /* Hard drive capacity (e.g., 256GB) */,
  "graphics" INTEGER /* Graphics card type (e.g., NVIDIA GeForce) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the laptop (e.g., Dell, HP) */,
  "screen_size" REAL /* Screen size of the laptop (e.g., 15.6 inches) */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the laptop (e.g., 8 hours) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the laptop (e.g., Windows 10) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the laptop (e.g., 1.5 kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory level was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold at which the inventory should be reordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the laptop model */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the last reorder was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the retailer */,
  "is_loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is a loyalty program member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop model ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops ordered */,
  "item_total" REAL /* Total cost of the item */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales entry */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop model */,
  "total_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of laptops sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the laptop model */,
  "monthly_sales" INTEGER /* Monthly sales of the laptop model */,
  "yearly_sales" INTEGER /* Yearly sales of the laptop model */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the laptop model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the purchase belongs to */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_method" TEXT /* Method of purchase (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "purchase_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the purchase was made (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who belongs to the loyalty program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "points_earned_date" TEXT /* Date the points were earned */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the points expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who received the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, free gift) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion expires */,
  "promotion_value" REAL /* Value of the promotion (e.g., 10% discount) */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., sales manager, inventory manager) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the data before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
